examples: She scooped out the yeasty sediments.
A yeasty froth; yeasty bread dough; a yeasty home-brewed beer.
Try a sugar-spun coffin, or the eggy, yeasty pan de muerto (bread of the dead).
The loaves are complex and yeasty, full of earthy flavours, a touch of tang and a distinct underpinning of char.
Try the CK Jasne (a pale, wheaty beer) or the CK Dunkel Wiezen, a dark beer with a yeasty flavour.
